didItHoldUp.analysis: Britain's Astronomer Royal — the most senior space scientist in the country — called space travel 'utter bilge.' Sputnik launched 18 months later. Within 13 years, humans walked on the Moon. It's one thing for a random skeptic to get it wrong; it's another for the person whose literal job is to understand space to dismiss it entirely. The brevity of the quote makes it even better — just four devastating words that aged as badly as any sentence in scientific history.
